19 #include <arcane/ArcaneVersion.h>
20 #include <arcane/utils/ArcanePrecomp.h>
21 #include <arcane/utils/ArcaneGlobal.h>
22 #include <arcane/utils/UtilsTypes.h>
23 #include <arcane/Item.h>
24 #include <arcane/VariableTypes.h>
25 
26 #include <arcane/utils/PlatformUtils.h>
27 
28 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
29 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
30 
31 #include "ArcGeoSim/Utils/ContainerProxy/MeshVariableArray2Proxy.h"
32 #include "ArcGeoSim/Utils/ContainerProxy/MeshPartialVariableArray2Proxy.h"
33 #include "ArcGeoSim/Utils/ContainerProxy/VariableRefArray3Proxy.h"
34 #include "ArcGeoSim/Utils/ContainerProxy/Array3Proxy.h"
35 #include "ArcGeoSim/Utils/ArcGeoSimVersion.h"
36 
37 // Temporary to know if ArcGeoSimVersion.h exists and can be included.
38 // Can be removed when ArcGeoSim 2026.1.1 is installed
39 #define ARCGEOSIM_HAS_VERSION
40 
41 namespace ArcGeoSim
42 {
43 inline Arcane::String getOuputRootPath()
44  {
45  const Arcane::String env_full_output_path = Arcane::platform::getEnvironmentVariable("ARCANE_OUTPUT_ROOT_PATH");
46  if(env_full_output_path.null())
47  return Arcane::platform::getCurrentDirectory();
48  else
49  return env_full_output_path;
50  }
51 }
52 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
53 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
54 
55 // Namespace ArcGeoSim
56 namespace ArcGeoSim {
57  namespace Mesh {}
58  namespace Surface {}
59  namespace Property {}
60  namespace Numerics {}
61 }
62 
63 #define BEGIN_ARCGEOSIM_NAMESPACE namespace ArcGeoSim {
64 #define END_ARCGEOSIM_NAMESPACE }
65 #define BEGIN_MESH_NAMESPACE namespace Mesh {
66 #define END_MESH_NAMESPACE }
67 #define BEGIN_SURFACE_NAMESPACE namespace Surface {
68 #define END_SURFACE_NAMESPACE }
69 #define BEGIN_PROPERTY_NAMESPACE namespace Property {

73 #define BEGIN_NUMERICS_NAMESPACE namespace Numerics {

84 // Types primitifs de donn�es
85 using Arcane::Real;
86 using Arcane::Real2;
87 using Arcane::Real2x2;
88 using Arcane::Real3;
89 using Arcane::Real3x3;
90 using Arcane::Integer;
91 using Arcane::Int32;
92 using Arcane::Int64;
93 using Arcane::String;
94 using Arcane::Byte;
95 
96 // Types tableaux
97 using Arcane::Array;
98 using Arcane::Array2;
99 using Arcane::Array3;
100 using Arcane::ArrayView;
101 using Arcane::Array2View;
102 using Arcane::ConstArrayView;
103 using Arcane::ConstArray2View;
104 using Arcane::SharedArray;
105 using Arcane::UniqueArray;
106 
107 #define ARRAY_MACRO(array_type) \
108  using Arcane::Real##array_type; \
109  using Arcane::Real2##array_type; \
110  using Arcane::Real2x2##array_type; \
111  using Arcane::Real3##array_type; \
112  using Arcane::Real3x3##array_type; \
113  using Arcane::Integer##array_type; \
114  using Arcane::Int32##array_type; \
115  using Arcane::Int64##array_type; \
116  using Arcane::Bool##array_type;
117 
118 ARRAY_MACRO(Array);
119 ARRAY_MACRO(Array2);
120 ARRAY_MACRO(Array3);
121 ARRAY_MACRO(ArrayView);
122 ARRAY_MACRO(Array2View);
123 ARRAY_MACRO(ConstArrayView);
124 ARRAY_MACRO(ConstArray2View);
125 
126 #undef ARRAY_MACRO
127 
128 using Arcane::Item;
129 using Arcane::Cell;
130 using Arcane::Edge;
131 using Arcane::Face;
132 using Arcane::Node;
133 #ifndef USE_ARCANE_V3
134 using Arcane::DualNode;
135 using Arcane::Link;
136 #endif
137 using Arcane::Particle;
138 using Arcane::DoF;
139
